product.title: TLM Colour Changing Foundation, 2Pack Flawless Color Changing Foundation Makeup Base Moisturizing Liquid Foundation for Women, Concealer Cover, Girls SPF15, Sunscreen, Non-Greasy,Long Lasting
featureBullets: 【Colour Changing Foundation】Flawless Colour Changing Foundation is a revolutionary new liquid foundation that goes on white and instantly self-adjusts . Our unique color-matching formula protects and moisturises the skin as it works to even out your complexion.

【Sunscreen & Moisturizer】This foundation contain SPF15 sun protection to shield your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays. It is designed for daily use and will give your skin that illuminating silky finish other foundations just don’t provide.

【Unique Formula】The exclusive shade-sensing beads are activated by pressure upon application. So, as the makeup is thoroughly blended into skin, it intuitively transforms to your skin tone for all day, natural looking color in your perfect shade.

【For Daily Use】It is designed for daily use and will give your skin that illuminating silky finish other foundations just don’t provide. It will give your skin that illuminating silky finish other foundations just don’t provide.Suitable for all skin types.

【Buy with Confidence】We have an excellent customer service team. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us and we will give you a satisfactory answer as soon as possible. So there is no risk of you!

specification.value: #29,920 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #278 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation works well for various skin types, including normal to combination/oily complexions, and appreciate its lightweight, smooth application that stays nicely in place. The foundation receives positive feedback for its quality, with one customer noting it's better than luxury brands. The color match and coverage receive mixed reviews - while some say it matches skin color perfectly, others find it too white for their complexion, and while some report good coverage, others say it provides little to no coverage. The fragrance and greasiness aspects also get mixed reactions, with some enjoying the scent while others dislike it, and while many find it non-greasy, some report a thin white residue on their face.

reviews.reviewText: Better than luxury brands—my holy grail! "I’ve been using this foundation for two years now, and it has completely replaced the high-end brands I used to buy. I previously tried products two to three times the price, but they couldn't even manage a decent color match. TLM, however, matches my skin tone perfectly. The formula blends beautifully and wears all day without ever settling into fine lines or wrinkles. It provides the perfect amount of moisture without any greasy residue. Living in the South, the added SPF is a lifesaver against the brutal sun! What I love most is how my skin feels after I take it off—my face is incredibly soft, and at 68, I’m constantly receiving compliments on my complexion. I even gifted a bottle to my older sister, and now she’s just as hooked as I am! Getting two bottles for such an affordable price is the cherry on top. I truly love this stuff."
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 17, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love this makeup. I wish it was made in America lol but it’s great. It is very light coverage, but that is how I want my makeup. It matches my skin tone perfectly and a little goes a long way. I also love how cheap it is. I have tried other color matching foundations and have not been happy with them. This one is my favorite! And unlike normal foundations, this isn’t cakey, doesn’t irritate or dry out my skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 28, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Let me start by saying I usually don't leave long reviews but this one may be long and I apologize, but I feel, that for women, unless you're buying an old trysty, we need detailed make up reviews when buying on line. While this may work for some people, I know there are people like me that this isn't what they're looking for. My skin tones vary greatly through the seasons. I jokingly say I'm Irish in the winter (very white) and American Indian (pretty dark considering) in the summer. So I have to alter makeup accordingly. I haven't used liquid foundation in years and actually make my own mineral foundation so I can adjust the color easily. But this seemed even easier and I decided to try it based on the reviews, both on here, tiktok and other platforms. Now I'm wondering if I got a different product than most of the reviewers or if those are paid reviews. This is not what they claim. Let's start with the claims of being matte. Absolutely not. I hate "glowing" and put several ingredients into my make up to assure it is a matte finish (rice powder, zinc, titanium dioxide...). I let this stuff "dry" for 30 mins and it was still shiny and on the tacky side. Next....coverage. In spite of what they say and what you see in demonstrations, this provides little to no coverage. I have a few freckles I like to cover when using make up (I don't wear make up daily) and this didn't even disguise them. Lastly...color change. In that 30 minute "drying" time, I was also hoping for the color change to ocurr, but alas, I looked like a geisha girl. I had to take it off and start over. I might have been able to put my mineral make up over it, but I was already running late because of the 30 minute "drying" time so I didn't want to risk it. I may try using as a primer before I return it. The one truth to their claims is that it's lightweight. I hope my sincere review helps. It has helped me to be blocked from commenting on their ads on other platforms. LoL
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 29, 2024

reviews.reviewText: I love this foundation it makes my face feel so good and it feels moisturized all day and the color is just it goes by your skin and it’s white when you put it on it soaked in and it just makes your skin look so good and it’s so comfortable to use. It’s so stinking cheap. I love it. I buy it all the time.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2026

reviews.reviewText: My skin may be too far gone. It blends good, love the smell. lt is one of the few foundations that doesn't burn my eyes after applying. lt is light coverage and shows every wrinkle like a beacon. l will wear it because it is better than bare skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 18, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I really like this foundation... it's pretty cool to watch it turn to match your skin tone. I use a silicone "sponge" to apply to my face, so this might be the reason why, but it takes a little bit to sink into your skin. It has good coverage, but not full coverage. I was watching the video ads for this product and the end result looks like the girl also put on a powder foundation to get the type of coverage shown in that ad. That being said, though, the coverage isn't so light that you need to apply powder foundation on top of it, and once the foundation does settle into your skin it looks natural and as if you didn't have any foundation on. I like it, especially since it has SPF in it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 14, 2019

reviews.reviewText: Great product goes on so well light, moisturizing and I love the color match.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 12, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is an amazing product. Put it on like moisturizer and it magically disappears but hides redness and flaws. I have not worn foundation in 20 years but tried this and it is absolutely amazing!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 2, 2026
